description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat and slightly sloped roof, with a minimalist geometric design and a mix of light and dark exterior wall finishes. The property is surrounded by manicured hedges and mature trees, providing privacy and a natural boundary. The front entrance is accentuated by a paved driveway and a small landscaped area with sculpted bushes. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The rear of the bungalow includes a private patio area and additional parking space. The overall setting is urban, with the house situated adjacent to a paved road and integrated landscaping.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with geometric lines, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, set beside a paved road.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, car, and symmetrical landscaping with sculpted bushes and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof, side patio, and extensive greenery wrapping around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back parking area, flat roof sections, and dense hedge boundary.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the black facade, rear windows, and the road curving around the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and scattered windows
